sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108452" key="u(poi+a/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποϊάχω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <sense id="n108452.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sound forth a little</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in answer,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κράνα ὑ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.314</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anyt.</author></bibl>, s. v. l.).</sense> </entryFree>
